description: 24 mathematical attack paradigms — reviewed and expanded by 3 frontier models

paradigms.name: Algebraic Translation
paradigms.move: Reframe in richer algebraic category
paradigms.exemplar: FLT (Wiles 1995) — Frey curve to modularity

paradigms.name: Cohomological Obstruction
paradigms.move: Detect global impossibility via local-to-global failure classes
paradigms.exemplar: Brauer-Manin obstruction, Cassels-Tate pairing

paradigms.name: Symmetry Exploitation
paradigms.move: Use group actions to collapse search space
paradigms.exemplar: CFSG; Chuang-Rouquier for Broue

paradigms.name: Spectral Analysis
paradigms.move: Study eigenvalues of associated operator
paradigms.exemplar: Montgomery-Odlyzko GUE; Selberg trace formula

paradigms.name: Analytic Continuation
paradigms.move: Extend beyond natural domain to reveal global structure
paradigms.exemplar: Riemann zeta, L-function zeros govern prime distribution

paradigms.name: Geometric Flow
paradigms.move: Continuously deform object to canonical form
paradigms.exemplar: Poincare Conjecture (Perelman/Hamilton Ricci flow)

paradigms.name: Descent and Induction
paradigms.move: Reduce to simpler cases
paradigms.exemplar: Fermat infinite descent; Faltings Mordell

paradigms.name: Probabilistic Method
paradigms.move: Prove existence via random construction with positive probability
paradigms.exemplar: Erdos high-girth chromatic; Lovasz Local Lemma

paradigms.name: Exhaustive Computation
paradigms.move: Reduce to finite cases, verify by machine
paradigms.exemplar: Four Color Theorem; Boolean Pythagorean Triples (200TB SAT)

paradigms.name: Formal Verification
paradigms.move: Machine-check every inference step
paradigms.exemplar: 4-color in Coq; Flyspeck in Isabelle; PFR in Lean 4

paradigms.name: Sieve Methods
paradigms.move: Filter large set by local conditions, study residue
paradigms.exemplar: Brun twin primes; Maynard bounded gaps

paradigms.name: Height / Diophantine Geometry
paradigms.move: Assign arithmetic size, prove finiteness via height bounds
paradigms.exemplar: Faltings theorem; Uniformity conjecture

paradigms.name: Tropical / Degeneration
paradigms.move: Replace smooth with piecewise-linear combinatorial shadow
paradigms.exemplar: Mikhalkin correspondence theorem; Gross-Siebert mirror symmetry

paradigms.name: Forcing / Independence
paradigms.move: Construct alternative universes to show unprovability
paradigms.exemplar: Cohen continuum hypothesis

paradigms.name: Tensor Decomposition
paradigms.move: Decompose multi-index arrays to expose hidden rank
paradigms.exemplar: Strassen multiplication; quantum tensor networks

paradigms.name: Modular Arithmetic Statistics
paradigms.move: Lift local mod-p info to global via density and distribution
paradigms.exemplar: Sato-Tate; Smith Selmer distribution (2022)

paradigms.name: Variational / Extremal
paradigms.move: Identify as optimizer of functional, use optimality conditions
paradigms.exemplar: Plateau minimal surfaces; Flag algebra SDP bounds

paradigms.name: Operadic / Categorical
paradigms.move: Abstract composition structure as mathematical object
paradigms.exemplar: Grothendieck topoi; Fargues-Scholze; Gaitsgory geometric Langlands (2024)

paradigms.name: Model-Theoretic / O-Minimality
paradigms.move: Bound rational points on transcendental sets via tame definability
paradigms.exemplar: Andre-Oort (Pila-Shankar-Tsimerman 2021) via Pila-Wilkie counting

paradigms.name: Ergodic / Dynamical Systems
paradigms.move: Recast arithmetic/combinatorial statement as measure-preserving system, apply mixing/recurrence
paradigms.exemplar: Furstenberg proof of Szemeredi; Ratner unipotent flows; Lindenstrauss measure rigidity

paradigms.name: Higher-Order Fourier / Arithmetic Regularity
paradigms.move: Generalize Fourier to multilinear settings via Gowers norms and inverse theorems
paradigms.exemplar: Green-Tao primes in AP; PFR (Gowers-Green-Manners-Tao 2023)

paradigms.name: Information-Theoretic / Entropy
paradigms.move: Bound combinatorial quantities via information-theoretic inequalities (Shearer, submodularity, compression)
paradigms.exemplar: Entropy proof of Loomis-Whitney; Tao entropy moves on PFR; Moser-Tardos entropy compression

paradigms.name: Proof Mining / Reverse Mathematics
paradigms.move: Extract computational content (rates, bounds) from ineffective proofs
paradigms.exemplar: Kohlenbach extraction of quantitative bounds; proof-theoretic analysis of Ramsey

paradigms.name: Renormalization / Scale Separation
paradigms.move: Understand behavior by coarse-graining across scales, identifying fixed points and universality classes
paradigms.exemplar: Wilson RG; Salmhofer rigorous Ising exponents; Atkin-Lehner as scale transformation
